<div align="center">
  <h2>Know About Me</h2>
</div>

<div align="justify">
  <h3>Hey there! I'm Rashmika</h3>
  I'm a Software Engineering student from Sri Lanka with a passion for building practical software that solves real problems. By day, I'm writing Java and wrangling databases. By night, I'm either building a 2D game with LibGDX or producing R&B music on FL Studio Mobile. When I'm not doing either, you'll find me gaming or listening to Yung Kai and Wave to Earth on repeat.
  <br><br>

  <hr style="border: 1px solid #333; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;">

  <h3>Top Projects</h3>
  <a href="https://github.com/rashmikaog"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/ArgiLease-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>&nbsp; Agricultural equipment leasing platform — listings, bookings & rental management.<br>
  <a href="https://github.com/rashmikaog"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/TechCare_Services-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>&nbsp; Android repair management app — booking, tracking & profile system.<br>
  <a href="https://github.com/rashmikaog"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/The_Little_Book_Haven-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>&nbsp; Desktop bookstore system — inventory, roles, cashier & sales.<br>
  <a href="https://github.com/rashmikaog"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/LibGDX_Game_(WIP)-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>&nbsp; 2D Java game with custom menus, game states & sprite management.

  <hr style="border: 1px solid #333; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
</div>

<br clear="right"/>

<br>

> Code is never finished. It only becomes slightly less terrible over time.

> Every commit is essentially a small, desperate apology to my future self. Someday I'll return to this codebase, look at what I've written, and wonder who let me anywhere near a keyboard.

<br>
